title: ophrys lutea subsp. aspea
intro: Ophrys lutea subsp. aspea is a subspecies of orchid, commonly known as Aspe's Bee Orchid, which is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the genus Ophrys. It is known for its unique and beautiful appearance, with yellow and brown markings that resemble a female bee. The medicinal properties of Ophrys lutea subsp. aspea include its potential antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which may be beneficial in treating wounds and reducing swelling. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce pain and inflammation, and support the immune system, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use.
